---
title: "workflow"
output: html_document
date: "2026-01-15"
---


```{r}
library(readxl)
library(tidyverse)
library(tibble)
library(reshape)
library(stringr)
library(janitor)
ftir_pigmenti <- read_excel("ftir_pigmenti_rev_3.xlsx") |> 
  as_tibble() |> 
  mutate(V2 = str_remove(V2, '\\..*')) %>% 
  scrutiny::row_to_colnames(row = 1:5, collapse = "_", drop = F) %>% 
  tibble(.name_repair = "unique") |> 
  filter(duplicated(Sursa_ID_Color_Lustru_Angoba...2) == F)

d <- ftir_pigmenti |>  
  t() %>% 
  as_tibble() %>% 
scrutiny::row_to_colnames(row = 1:2, collapse = "_", drop = T) |> 
rownames_to_column(var = "ID") |> 
  clean_names() |> 
 mutate_at(c(7:647), as.numeric) |> 
    dplyr::rename("ID" = "id") |> 
  unite(col = rowname, c(1,2,3), remove = F) |> 
  column_to_rownames(var = "rowname") |> 
  unite(col = rowname, c(1,2,3,4,5), remove = F)

  

```


```{r}
gradient_col <- list(low = "black", 
                     mid = "white",
                     high = "red")

df_centr <- d[,-c(1:6)] |> 
  scale() |> 
  as.data.frame() 

library(hopkins)   

indice_grupare <- get_clust_tendency(df_centr, n = nrow(df_centr) - 20)
indice_grupare

matrice_dist <- dist(df_centr, method = "minkowski")


fviz_dist(matrice_dist, show_labels = T) +
  labs(title = "Grafic 5. Tendințe de grupare",
       subtitle = "Indice Hopkins: 0.9") 

library(clValid)
library(psych)

distance_matrix <- distance(df_centr)

distance_matrix <- as.matrix(distance_matrix)

internal_validation <- clValid(distance_matrix, 2:4, 
                               clMethods = c("hierarchical"),
                               validation = c("internal", "stability"))

summary(internal_validation)

clust_df <- eclust(df_centr,
                               FUNcluster = "agnes",
                               #k = 2,
                               hc_metric = "minkowski",
                               hc_method = "ward.D2"
                               )

dendro <- fviz_dend(clust_df) +
  labs(title = "Grafic 6. Dendrograma") +
  theme_light()

clust_df <- eclust(df_centr,
                               FUNcluster = "agnes",
                               k = 3,
                               hc_metric = "minkowski",
                               hc_method = "ward.D2"
                               )
export_clus <- clust_df$cluster
df$clustere <- as.factor(export_clus)

plot_pca <- fviz_cluster(clust_df, 
             geom = "point",
             repel = T,
             main = "Grafic 7. Proiecția clusterelor pe primele două componente principale",
             subtitle = "Literele F, I și G denotă textura fină, intermediară, sau grosieră a fragmentului ceramic ",
            legend.title = "Clustere") + 
  geom_text(label = d$rowname, 
            hjust = 0.5, 
            nudge_y = -0.09, 
            check_overlap = TRUE)
plot_pca


```

#EDA 

```{r}
library(factoextra)
library(FactoMineR)
library(ggplot2)
library(viridis)
library(writexl)

X <- PCA(d[,-c(1:6)], scale.unit = TRUE, graph = T)

pca_res <- X$ind$coord |> as.data.frame() |> 
  as_tibble() |>
  rownames_to_column(var = "ID")

d2 <- d %>% 
full_join(pca_res) |> 
  unite(col = rowname, c(1,2,3), remove = F) |> 
  column_to_rownames(var = "rowname")


```


```{r}
write_xlsx(d_wide, path = "C:/Users/georg/OneDrive/Proiecte_R/FTIR_Pigmenti/ftir_date_full_cu_PCA.xlsx")
```


```{r}
d %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = Dim.1, y = Dim.2, shape = sursa_sursa, color = color_color)) + 
    geom_point(aes(size = 2), position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(
    label = lustru_lustru), 
    nudge_x = 2, 
    nudge_y = 2, 
    check_overlap = T
  ) +
  geom_text(aes(
    label = angoba_angoba), 
    nudge_x = 1, 
    nudge_y = 1, 
    check_overlap = T
  ) +
  ggtitle("PCA tot") +
  scale_color_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "H")

d %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = Dim.1, y = Dim.2, shape = Sursa, color = Angoba)) + 
    geom_point(aes(size = 2), position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(
    label = ID), 
    nudge_x = 2, 
    nudge_y = 2, 
    check_overlap = T
  ) +
  geom_text(aes(
    label = Color), 
    nudge_x = 1, 
    nudge_y = 1, 
    check_overlap = T
  ) +
  ggtitle("PCA tot") +
  scale_color_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "H")


d %>% filter(Color %in% "rosu") %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = Dim.1, y = Dim.2, shape = Sursa, color = Angoba)) + 
    geom_point(aes(size = 2), position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(
    label = ID), 
    nudge_x = 1, 
    nudge_y = 1) +
  ggtitle("PCA rosu") +
  scale_color_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "H")

d %>% filter(Color %in% "alb") %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = Dim.1, y = Dim.2, shape = Sursa, color = Angoba)) + 
    geom_point(aes(size = 2), position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(
    label = ID), 
    nudge_x = 1, 
    nudge_y = 1, 
    check_overlap = T
  ) +
  ggtitle("PCA alb") +
  scale_color_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "H")

d %>% filter(Color %in% "negru") %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = Dim.1, y = Dim.2, shape = Sursa, color = Angoba)) + 
    geom_point(aes(size = 2), position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(
    label = ID), 
    nudge_x = 1, 
    nudge_y = 1, 
    check_overlap = T
  ) +
  ggtitle("PCA negru") +
  scale_color_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "H")

d %>% filter(Color %in% "blank") %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = Dim.1, y = Dim.2, shape = Angoba, color = Sursa)) + 
    geom_point(aes(size = 2), position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(
    label = ID), 
    nudge_x = 2, 
    nudge_y = 2, 
    check_overlap = T
  ) +
  ggtitle("PCA blank") +
  scale_color_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "H")

d %>% filter(Sursa %in% "Luturi") %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = Dim.1, y = Dim.2, shape = Angoba, color = Color)) + 
    geom_point(aes(size = 2), position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(
    label = ID), 
    nudge_x = 2, 
    nudge_y = 2, 
    check_overlap = T
  ) +
  ggtitle("PCA luturi") +
   scale_color_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "H")

d %>% filter(Sursa %in% "Placute") %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = Dim.1, y = Dim.2, shape = Angoba, color = Color)) + 
    geom_point(aes(size = 2), position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(
    label = ID), 
    nudge_x = 2, 
    nudge_y = 2, 
    check_overlap = T
  ) +
  ggtitle("PCA Placute") +
  scale_color_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "H")


```

```{r}
pca_var_contrib <- get_pca_var(X)$contrib |> 
  as.data.frame() |> 
  rownames_to_column()

pca_var_cor <- get_pca_var(X)$cor |> 
  as.data.frame() |> 
  rownames_to_column()

write_xlsx(pca_var_contrib, path = "C:/Users/georg/OneDrive/Proiecte_R/FTIR_Pigmenti/contributii_dim_1.xlsx")

Dim.1 <- pca_var_cor |> slice_max(Dim.1, n = 50)
 
Dim.1 |> 
  mutate(rowname = fct_reorder(rowname, Dim.1)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(Dim.1, rowname)) +
  geom_col() +
  xlab(label = "Contribuții la CP 1") +
  ylab(label = "")

Dim.2 <- pca_var_cor |> slice_max(Dim.2, n = 50)

write_xlsx(pca_var_contrib, path = "C:/Users/georg/OneDrive/Proiecte_R/FTIR_Pigmenti/contributii_dim_2.xlsx")

 
Dim.2 |> 
  mutate(rowname = fct_reorder(rowname, Dim.2)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(Dim.2, rowname)) +
  geom_col() +
  xlab(label = "Contribuții la CP 2") +
  ylab(label = "")


  

```

```{r}
library(writexl)

pca_var_cor <- get_pca_var(X)$cor |> 
  as.data.frame() |> 
  rownames_to_column()
write_xlsx(pca_var_cor, path = "C:/Users/georg/OneDrive/Proiecte_R/FTIR_Pigmenti/corelatii_dim_1si2.xlsx")



Dim.1.cor <- bind_rows(pca_var_cor |> slice_max(Dim.1, n = 50), 
  pca_var_cor |> slice_min(Dim.1, n = 50)
  ) 
 

Dim.1.cor |> 
  mutate(rowname = fct_reorder(rowname, Dim.1)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(Dim.1, rowname)) +
  geom_col() +
  xlab(label = "Corelație cu CP 1") +
  ylab(label = "")

Dim.2.cor <- bind_rows(pca_var_cor |> slice_max(Dim.2, n = 50), 
  pca_var_cor |> slice_min(Dim.2, n = 50)
  ) 
 
Dim.2.cor |> 
  mutate(rowname = fct_reorder(rowname, Dim.2)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(Dim.2, rowname)) +
  geom_col() +
  xlab(label = "Corelație cu CP 2") +
  ylab(label = "")

```
